arganOils.title: Argan & botanical oils
arganOils.desc: Cold-pressed argan, prickly pear, and nutrient-dense carrier oils anchor Moroccan beauty rituals. nevali partners document sourcing so you know the orchard, the press, and the story behind every bottle.

skincare.title: Clean Moroccan skincare
skincare.desc: Serums, creams, and masks formulated with local actives—rose water, ghassoul clays, botanical antioxidants—balanced for modern routines while respecting sensitive skin.

hammamBody.title: Hammam & body rituals
hammamBody.desc: Beldi soaps, kessa scrubs, hair masks, and spa-grade textures that translate Moroccan hammam culture into daily self-care—still handmade where it matters.

hairFragrance.title: Haircare & botanical scent
hairFragrance.desc: Desert botanicals meet perfumery: shampoos, masks, and eaux inspired by Moroccan gardens—jasmine, orange blossom, resins—crafted by independent noses and labs.

faq.introMulti: For shoppers discovering Moroccan beauty, and for brands joining the nevali marketplace.
faq.introSingle: For shoppers discovering Moroccan beauty—directly from {brand}.
faq.stillBody: Our team typically responds within one business day.

multi.a: nevali is Morocco’s curated cosmetics marketplace: bio-minded, original formulas from independent Moroccan brands—sold online with guest checkout, clear ingredients, and certifications you can trust.

Partners register, submit company and product documentation, and go through admin review. Listings cover INCI-style ingredients, imagery, variants, and payment options (card and/or cash on delivery). Approved products appear in the public catalog.

multi.q: What kinds of products can I find?
multi.a: Skincare, haircare, body and hammam rituals, botanical oils (including argan), fragrances, and accessories—focused on Moroccan origin and responsible formulation rather than generic white-label imports.

multi.q: Do I need an account to buy?
multi.a: No. You can browse, add to cart, and check out as a guest. Creating a free buyer account is optional if you want saved lists, alerts, and order history when your email matches checkout.

multi.q: How can I verify a product or brand?
multi.a: Each listing shows the brand behind the SKU. Partners can upload certifications (separate from product approval) and admins verify documents. Product pages highlight ingredients and origin so you know what you are applying.
Browsing is free. Commercial terms for partners (subscriptions or success fees) are agreed in onboarding. Buyers pay product and shipping prices shown at checkout—no hidden RFQ layer.

single.a: {brand} is our Moroccan skincare and cosmetics line—formulated in our studio, bio-minded where it matters, with transparent labels and guest-friendly checkout (card and/or cash on delivery where enabled).

Every SKU is prepared for the shop with clear INCI-style ingredients, photography, variants, and payment options. Certifications and lab notes are published when relevant so you know exactly what you are buying from {brand}.

single.q: What kinds of products can I find?
single.a: Skincare, haircare, body and hammam rituals, botanical oils (including argan), fragrances, and accessories—Moroccan origin and responsible formulation, all under the Nevali line.

single.q: Do I need an account to buy?
single.a: No. You can browse, add to cart, and check out as a guest. Creating a free buyer account is optional if you want saved lists, alerts, and order history when your email matches checkout.

single.q: How can I verify a product?
single.a: Each product page highlights ingredients, capacity, and origin. Certificates and documents for {brand} appear on our public profile when available.
Browsing is free. You pay the product and shipping prices shown at checkout—no hidden layers.

testimonials.subtitleMulti: Moroccan labs, cooperatives, and retailers growing together on the nevali marketplace.
testimonials.subtitleSingle: Moroccan labs, cooperatives, and retailers who collaborate with {brand} on formulations, packaging, and distribution.

cards.quote: "nevali gave our cooperative shelf-ready storytelling. Within weeks of launch we were shipping argan serums to Paris boutiques—with ingredients and batches documented the way EU buyers expect."
cards.name: Fatima Ait Benhaddou
cards.role: Director, Coopérative Souss — Argan & rose skincare

cards.quote: "Supplier diligence used to take months. nevali surfaces Moroccan labs with documentation, imagery, and checkout-ready SKUs—we onboarded a new argan line in under three weeks."
cards.name: Lars Van der Berg

cards.quote: "The training modules taught us how to photograph textures, write INCI blocks, and prep export paperwork. Support tickets keep our hammam line compliant without hiring a full-time regulatory team."
cards.name: Mohammed Benali
cards.role: Lead formulator, Domaine Berbère — botanical skincare, Taliouine

contact.metaDescMulti: Reach the nevali team for brand partnerships, press, and platform support.
contact.metaDescSingle: Contact {brand} for wholesale, press, orders, and product questions.
contact.title: Talk to nevali
contact.introMulti: We help Moroccan cosmetics brands list compliant products and reach shoppers who care about bio-minded, original formulas. For onboarding, technical issues, or press enquiries, use the channel below that fits best.
contact.introSingle: Questions about {brand} products, wholesale, or your order? Reach our team on the channel below that fits best.
contact.cardSupportBodyMulti: Signed-in partners can open tickets from the dashboard for faster routing.
contact.cardSupportBodySingle: Signed-in studio accounts can open support tickets from the dashboard for faster routing.
contact.envHintConfigured: This address is configured via CONTACT_PUBLIC_EMAIL in your environment.
contact.envHintDefault: Set CONTACT_PUBLIC_EMAIL in .env for production; until then the default above is shown.
contact.privacyOptionalLabel: Optional operator label from LEGAL_POLICY_EFFECTIVE_DATE: {date}. This is for your own versioning notes only; it does not make this page a binding or counsel-reviewed privacy policy.
contact.privacyLead: This section describes how nevali handles personal data in plain language. It is
contact.privacyTrail: a substitute for a jurisdiction-specific privacy policy reviewed by your counsel. Before you rely on it for compliance (GDPR, CCPA, Morocco Law 09-08, etc.), have qualified legal advisors adapt it to your processing activities, retention periods, and subprocessors.
contact.privacyCollectBody: Account identifiers (name, email), authentication data managed by our auth provider, profile and organization details you submit as a partner, buyer inquiry content (product interest, quantities, messages), support ticket text, training progress metadata, and technical logs needed to secure the service (IP address, device type, timestamps).
contact.privacyWhyBody: To create and maintain accounts, match buyers with artisans, deliver transactional emails you request, operate RFQ and contract workflows, improve reliability, respond to legal requests, and detect abuse. Marketing uses, if any, will be based on consent where required.
contact.privacySharingBody: We use infrastructure and email providers you configure in production (for example database hosting, object storage for uploads, and transactional mail). Those providers process data on our instructions. We do not sell personal data.
contact.privacyRetentionBody: We retain data while the account is active and for a limited period afterwards for legal, security, and dispute-resolution purposes. You may request access, correction, or deletion where applicable by contacting us; some records must be kept to meet accounting or regulatory obligations.
contact.termsOptional: Same optional display date as under Privacy ({date}); still not a substitute for executed terms with counsel.
contact.termsIntroLead: By using nevali you agree to follow these rules in addition to any separate agreement you sign with us. This summary is
contact.termsIntroTrail: a binding contract; publish counsel-approved terms for partners, buyers, and visitors before commercial launch.
contact.termsAccountsBody: You must provide accurate information. Partner accounts may require approval. You are responsible for safeguarding credentials and for activity under your account.
contact.termsConductBodyMulti: Users must negotiate in good faith, avoid fraudulent listings or inquiries, and comply with export and sanctions laws applicable to their trade. nevali may suspend access for violations or risk to other users.
contact.termsConductBodySingle: Customers, wholesale partners, and our team must interact in good faith, avoid fraudulent orders or inquiries, and comply with export and sanctions laws applicable to their trade. nevali may suspend access for violations or risk to others.
contact.termsContentBody: You retain rights to content you upload. You grant nevali a licence to host, display, and distribute that content as needed to operate the platform (for example showing product pages to buyers).
contact.termsDisclaimerBody: The platform is provided on an “as is” basis to the extent permitted by law. nevali is not a party to contracts between buyers and artisans unless explicitly stated otherwise; users are responsible for their own commercial terms, inspections, and compliance.

artisanProcess.heroEyebrow: Why Moroccan beauty needs a new lane
artisanProcess.heroBody: Incredible formulas sit in small labs while resellers copy the story. nevali exists so bio-minded Moroccan cosmetics reach shoppers with proof, price clarity, and dignity for the maker.
artisanProcess.heroImageAlt: Moroccan beauty brand workspace with skincare and makeup
artisanProcess.heroStatCaption: boutique retail abroad—for a serum batch the lab invoiced at 900 MAD
artisanProcess.founderImageAlt: Beauty founder in a professional setting representing Moroccan cosmetics brands
artisanProcess.founderKicker: A story repeated across cooperatives & labs
artisanProcess.founderP1: Yasmine runs a small lab outside Agadir. Cold-pressed argan, rhassoul masks, and rose serums leave her bench every week—yet most shoppers only see them repackaged under foreign labels. She rarely meets the people wearing her textures, and almost never captures the margin they pay abroad.
artisanProcess.founderP2: Last season she bottled a brightening oil that took ten weeks to stabilize. A broker bought the batch for 900 MAD per litre. The same formula resurfaced in London for €48—story rewritten, origin blurred. Yasmine saw almost none of that upside.
artisanProcess.founderQuote: I know our botanicals are world-class. I just need a shelf that tells the truth—in our words.

formulationSteps.title: Sourcing botanicals
formulationSteps.body: Cold-pressed oils, clays, and hydrosols move from cooperatives into quarantine—COA checks, moisture specs, and scent panels before a gram is blended.

formulationSteps.title: Lab compounding
formulationSteps.body: Chemists balance pH, preservatives, and sensorial slip. Pilot batches chill in stability ovens while INCI copy is drafted in three languages.

formulationSteps.title: Filling & compliance
formulationSteps.body: Lot codes, tamper seals, and UFI-ready labels. Nothing leaves the lab until Moroccan and export checklists are signed.

formulationSteps.title: Launch on nevali
formulationSteps.body: Approved SKUs go live with photography, reviews, and guest checkout—COD or card—so the story stays with the maker.

artisanProcess.brokenChainBody: A €95 face oil. Brokers, repackagers, and duty-free counters each take a slice. The Moroccan maker who pressed the argan often keeps single-digit percent.
artisanProcess.brokenChainFootnote: * Illustrative economics for a premium cosmetics SKU. Actual splits vary by channel, taxes, and fulfilment.

emotionalTruth.label: Micro-beauty labs & cooperatives
emotionalTruth.body: Morocco’s cosmetics scene is fragmented—brilliant at formulation, under-resourced on global storytelling, and squeezed by traders who white-label their oils.

emotionalTruth.label: Shoppers ask for origin proof
emotionalTruth.body: Buyers want INCI clarity, batch discipline, and proof of Moroccan origin. Without a digital home, even pristine labs fail the trust bar online.

emotionalTruth.label: Typical margin after opaque resale
emotionalTruth.body: When serums are sold through anonymous brokers, the lab that compounded them rarely captures the value the consumer assumes reaches Morocco.

artisanProcess.solutionBodyMulti: nevali connects verified Moroccan beauty brands directly to shoppers—guest checkout, COD or card, and structured order lines. Brands set pricing and inventory; customers see the real story on every PDP.
artisanProcess.solutionBodySingle: {brand} brings Moroccan skincare and beauty from our studio to you—guest checkout, COD or card where enabled, and product pages written in our voice, with ingredients and imagery you can trust.
artisanProcess.solutionBody2Multi: We layer compliance tooling, certification uploads, training, and support tickets so labs can focus on what they do best: bio-original formulas that feel unmistakably Moroccan.
artisanProcess.solutionBody2Single: We invest in compliance, certifications, training, and support tooling so our lab can focus on what we do best: bio-original formulas that feel unmistakably Moroccan.
artisanProcess.beforeCaption: of retail value to maker (typical broker path)
artisanProcess.afterCaptionMulti: target share returned to partner brands
artisanProcess.afterCaptionSingle: target share retained by {brand} on direct sales
artisanProcess.solutionImageAlt: Curated Moroccan skincare and cosmetic products
artisanProcess.solutionQuoteMulti: For the first time, shoppers read our INCI list in our words—and checkout stays with us.
artisanProcess.solutionQuoteSingle: We write every INCI list in our own words—and checkout stays with {brand}.

cart.metaDescription: Review your cosmetics selection before checkout. No account required—pay as a guest when you proceed.
cart.title: Your cart
cart.intro: Checkout is open to everyone—you do not need to create an account. Use the same email as your buyer profile if you want orders to show up under My orders.
cart.emptyBody: Browse products and add items you want to include in checkout.

checkoutPage.metaDescription: Guest-friendly checkout: contact, shipping, and payment—no sign-in required.
checkoutPage.title: Checkout
checkoutPage.intro: Enter your details and shipping address. Pay by card (Stripe) when enabled, or choose cash on delivery. Sellers ship your cosmetics directly.
checkoutPage.guestNoteRest: This is guest checkout—you are not asked to sign in. Creating a buyer account is optional if you want order history in the app.

checkout.errorNoPayment: No payment method is available for the items in your cart. Remove conflicting products or contact us.

checkout.stepShippingHint: Where we should deliver this order or reach you for coordination.

checkoutSuccess.title: Order placed successfully
checkoutSuccess.successBanner: Success: your order has been confirmed.

checkoutSuccess.guestNote: You completed this as a guest—no login was required. Keep this reference in your email; register as a buyer with the same address if you would like future orders listed under My orders.
checkoutSuccess.stripeProcessing: Payment is still processing. If you completed checkout, you will receive a confirmation email shortly.
checkoutSuccess.stripeVerifyFallback: Could not verify payment immediately. Check your email for confirmation.

checkoutSuccessSummary.title: Order details you submitted
